name: Cadillac Ventures Inc.
summary: Cadillac Ventures Inc. engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties in Canada. It primarily holds interests in the Burnt Hill property, a tungsten tin project located outside of Fredericton, New Brunswick; and the Thierry project covering approximately 11,000 acres located in north-western Ontario. Cadillac Ventures Inc. was incorporated in 1995 and is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
